title: Calculates the Incalculable
summary: Awesome mathematical ability allows you to model the world in real time, giving you an edge over everyone.
tiers: Tier 3: Subconscious Defense or Enhanced Intellect
Tier 6: Knowing the Unknown or Greater Enhanced Intellect
gm_intrusions: Too many predicted results threaten to overwhelm and stun the character. A result points to imminent disaster.
text: Awesome mathematical ability allows you to model the world in real time, giving you an edge over everyone.
